Part 1: Enemy takedown

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range1
RewardMission Tutorial 1

Defeat 10 the quest targets

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 10 the required hostiles.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Spawner takedown.

Description

Welcome to the chaos, Captain! We need your help, take down 10 enemies of any kind and receive a well deserved reward.

Have funsies!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 2: Spawner takedown

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypespawner
Level range1-3
RewardMission Tutorial 2

Defeat 1 the required spawners in Hyperion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 1 the required spawners.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Junk is valuable.

Description

The spawners are the home of the enemies. Killing enemies is great, but killing spawners is even better!

Take one down to secure the area from enemies.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 3: Junk is valuable

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range2
RewardMission Tutorial 4

Collect 20 Metal Scrap

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 20 Metal Scrap.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Recycle Station.

Description

When enemy ships are destroyed, the wreckage is left in space for other space travellers to pick up. This junk can be recycled into valuable resources. Captain, we need you to collect 20 units of scrap metal!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 4: Recycle Station

CategoryStory
Typerecycle
Subtypen/a
Level range2
RewardMission Tutorial 4

Recycle 20 Metal Scrap

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 20 Metal Scrap and recycle it at the requested station.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Upgrades.

Description

Good work picking up all that junk, Captain!

Now, bring those 20 units of scrap metal to the recycle station and turn it into valuable minerals.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 5: Upgrades

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range2
RewardMission Tutorial 2

Travel / deliver to AF Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to AF Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Exploration.

Description

Captain, we have allied upgrade stations placed around the galaxy. Press 'M' to locate the station in this system and go pay them a visit.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 6: Exploration

CategoryStory
Typeexplore
Subtypen/a
Level range2
RewardMission Tutorial 3

Explore the target area

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Turn in the quest to unlock The Warp Gate.

Description

Captain, we are gathering intelligence from all planets in the galaxy. You can take down a planet's defensive shield by destroying the spawners orbiting the planet. Then you may safely land and send down your teams.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 7: The Warp Gate

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range4
RewardMission Tutorial 4

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Captain, it time you learn how to warp. You can get a warp pass to another system and fast travel at the Warp Gate. Press 'M' to locate it on the map and go visit them.

(If you are already in Kapello, just warp back to Hyperion and land on the warp gate)

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
